anchors.value: Continue the existing doc-tool hardening trajectory: plan first, then TDD for create/materialize semantics, format-aware validation, and post-write verification receipts.

New session focus: architecture/spec-first modernization of doc-intel into cleaner hivemind_doc, hivemind_handoff, and hivemind_inspect boundaries; do not resume the completed YAML/XML hardening slice unless regression evidence appears.
